title: Suvendu Adhikari Alleges Vandalism of Lord Ram Statue in Nandigram; Slams CM Mamata
description: BJP leader Suvendu Adhikari accused anti-social elements of vandalising a statue of Lord Ram in Nandigram ahead of Ram Navami and alleged that West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee backs "goons" for vote bank politics, while the Trinamool Congress government is against Hindus.
